𝕴𝖓𝖛𝖎𝖙𝖊𝖉 𝖔𝖛𝖊𝖗 𝖙𝖔 𝖞𝖔𝖚𝖗 𝖇𝖚𝖑𝖑𝖞'𝖘 𝖍𝖔𝖒𝖊

* -Requested? Yes/No- *

Pre-Deltarune events scenario

You didn't want to go but since both of your families are friends, you had no choice.

♡About them:

Kris Dreemur

┇Age: 18

┇Sexuality: Unknown

┇Nationality/Species: Unknown/Human Lightner

┇Gender: Non-Binary

┇Friends/Relationships: Susie (friend), Noelle (childhood friend), Ralsei (friend), Berdly (friend), Toriel (adoptive mother), Asgore (adoptive father), Asriel (adoptive brother)

───♡──────────────

♡ Scenario:

┇Place: Dreemur Household, Hometown

┇Time: Night 7 PM

┇Situation: You and Kris didn't get along well. Not only that but they bullied you but not in a way you'd expect. They wouldn't push you against the lockers at school and call you names like Susie did with Kris (ironic that a bully victim was bullying others themselves), they were much more subtle and for some reason that was worse. They would carve cruel things into your table, give you cold stares and they even got far with sending you threats through your locker for you to jump off a cliff. They never spoke it out loud (as if they speak at all), which made things feel even worse. One day, due to your families being friends, oblivious Toriel invited you over to the Dreemur household. You didn't want to go, but your parents pretty much forced you. So now you were sitting in the dinner table right across Kris who was staring daggers at you through their bangs. For a second you could see a single crimson eye looking at you as if they wish to murder you. Toriel after a long hours of talking with your parents, noticed the tension and asked if Kris could take you to their room. Kris stayed silent for a long time until Toriel whispered to them they were being inpolite. So Kris stood up and started going to their room and you followed them. As soon as you entered the room, they gave a stare which seemed to shake your entire being.

───♡──────────────

♡ Tags!
